packages.description: the BLAKE3 hash function

packages.name: byteorder
packages.description: Library for reading/writing numbers in big-endian and little-endian.

packages.name: bytes
packages.description: Types and traits for working with bytes

packages.name: cc
packages.description:
A build-time dependency for Cargo build scripts to assist in invoking the native
C compiler to compile native C code into a static archive to be linked into Rust
code.

packages.name: cfg-if
packages.description:
A macro to ergonomically define an item depending on a large number of #[cfg]
parameters. Structured like an if-else chain, the first matching branch is the
item that gets emitted.

packages.name: cobs
packages.description:
This is an implementation of the Consistent Overhead Byte Stuffing (COBS) algorithm.
    COBS is an algorithm for transforming a message into an encoding where a specific value
    (the "sentinel" value) is not used. This value can then be used to mark frame boundaries
    in a serial communication channel.

packages.name: constant_time_eq
packages.description: Compares two equal-sized byte strings in constant time.

packages.name: cpufeatures
packages.description:
Lightweight runtime CPU feature detection for aarch64, loongarch64, and x86/x86_64 targets,
with no_std support and support for mobile targets including Android and iOS

packages.name: critical-section
packages.description: Cross-platform critical section

packages.description: Utilities for concurrent programming

packages.name: dashmap
packages.description: Blazing fast concurrent HashMap for Rust.

packages.name: embedded-io

packages.description: Embedded IO traits

packages.name: heapless

packages.name: postcard

packages.name: proc-macro2

packages.name: rustc_version

packages.name: scopeguard
packages.description:
A RAII scope guard that will run a given closure when it goes out of scope,
even if the code between panics (assuming unwinding panic).

Defines the macros `defer!`, `defer_on_unwind!`, `defer_on_success!` as
shorthands for guards with one of the implemented strategies.

packages.name: semver
packages.description: Parser and evaluator for Cargo's flavor of Semantic Versioning

packages.name: serde
packages.description: A generic serialization/deserialization framework

packages.name: serde_core
packages.description: Serde traits only, with no support for derive -- use the `serde` crate instead

packages.name: serde_derive
packages.description: Macros 1.1 implementation of #[derive(Serialize, Deserialize)]

packages.name: shlex
packages.description: Split a string into shell words, like Python's shlex.
